competitor.name: The Trade Desk
competitor.summary: Largest independent DSP pushing AI-driven optimization (Kokai) and identity (UID2) across CTV and open web.

kargo.name: Baseline
gaps: Self-serve AI optimization parity vs TTD Kokai / StackAdapt
Retail media graph depth vs Criteo / Amazon

signals.title: Trade Desk hiring 12 ML Engineers for “Kokai Decisioning”
signals.summary: Cluster of senior ML roles referencing real-time decisioning, feature stores, and advertiser goal translation—signals continued Kokai investment.
signals.rawExcerpt: Build and productionize models that translate advertiser objectives into bid / budget decisions within the Kokai platform…

signals.title: TTD eng blog: “Feature store for real-time creative selection”
signals.summary: Technical post confirms investment in low-latency creative ranking—blurs line between DSP optimization and creative intelligence.
signals.rawExcerpt: We describe a feature store that serves creative embeddings to bid-time models under 8ms p99…

opportunities.title: Ship goal-based AI optimization
opportunities.thesis: Buyers now expect goal → optimize. Creative strength needs a decisioning layer.
opportunities.whyItMatters: TTD / StackAdapt / DV360 are resetting the AI-DSP narrative.
opportunities.move: Closed beta: goal → format/placement optimizer for high-impact units.
opportunities.expectedImpact: Defend budgets shifting to “AI DSP” stories.
recommendedActions: Publish public case proof in 90 days

opportunities.title: Generative studio for Kargo formats
opportunities.thesis: Competitors productize brief → variants → score. Own that loop inside Kargo units.
opportunities.whyItMatters: Creative speed is becoming a buying criterion, not a service add-on.
opportunities.move: Generate format-native variants with predicted attention scoring.
opportunities.expectedImpact: Faster self-serve; lock formats as the generation target.

opportunities.title: Pilot a brand-safe buying agent
opportunities.thesis: Public capital is chasing agentic buying. Narrow to premium Kargo inventory.
opportunities.whyItMatters: Agents may bypass classic DSP UIs over the next cycle.
opportunities.move: Internal spike: NL plan → Kargo inventory with safety guardrails.
recommendedActions: Guardrails: safety, format fit, attention floors

quarterlyMoves.title: Kokai decisioning hiring surge
quarterlyMoves.oneLiner: 12+ public ML roles tied to real-time bid decisioning.

quarterlyMoves.title: Creative feature-store eng post
quarterlyMoves.oneLiner: Public blog: sub-8ms creative ranking infra.

learnings.title: Goal-in, optimize-out is table stakes
learnings.lesson: Kokai + public ML hiring show buyers expect AI to translate goals into bids.
learnings.quickWin: Ship a closed beta: brand goal → high-impact format/placement optimizer.

llmBrief.summary: The Trade Desk: direct DSP. Watch level: focus. 2 public signals. Opportunity score 86/100.
